text.title: Service Bootstrap Checklist Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the checklist artefact this methodology produces. Validator in scripts/validate-service-bootstrap-checklist.py enforces required keys, enum bounds, and pattern constraints.

section.title: Schema

example.note: All required keys present; enums and patterns satisfied.
Forbidden traits: checklist count != 12; traffic_gate_open=true with any item done=false and no waiver; missing owner/evidence_link.
